block_00: Stock and crypto news of the week inside
block_03: Elon Musk’s Boring Company has chosen to accept Dogecoin as payment for its Hyperloop service. Earlier this year, Tesla began accepting Dogecoin as payment for merchandise. Tesla's CEO has been a vocal proponent of Dogecoin for many years, almost single-handed driving the popularity of the memecoin with his continuous tweets on its use case.
block_07: Shares are up 5% in morning trading Tuesday, following a holiday weekend that saw a new rival about to enter the market - plus 26% this week, great news for investors.
block_10: The share price fell by 10% in a week after the news that the Supervisory Board appoints Sabine Mlnarsky as Chief Human Resources Officer of Commerzbank.
